title: Freight Unit Building Rule Essentials
summary: FUBR defines split, merge, and relevance behavior for demand conversion.
fullContent: Freight Unit Building Rule configuration determines how demand documents transform into freight units. Core controls include grouping dimensions, split triggers, and relevance checks.
importantPoints: Map business split logic by plant, route, and delivery date
Align FU granularity with planning strategy
consultantNotes: Audit FUBR after each release transport
Keep a regression matrix for key delivery types
realWorldExamples: Regional dispatch center splits FU by delivery zone and loading day
commonMistakes: Over-splitting FU causing excessive planning complexity
interviewQuestions: How would you tune FUBR for mixed pallet and parcel flows?
